login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Track sessions, stay focused, get better every day.

register.title: Let's get started
register.subtitle: Create your Prodify account and start your first streak.
register.hasAccount: Already have an account? Sign in

slide1.title: Welcome to Prodify
slide1.body: Time your studio work with clarity — session types, mood, tags, and streak-aware focus.

slide2.title: Build your streak
slide2.body: Daily momentum beats motivation spikes. We will guard your chain with smart reminders.

slide3.title: Beat your friends
slide3.body: Leaderboards and activity keep you accountable — produce like it is a sport.

goal.title: Weekly session goal
goal.body: Pick a target you can defend. You can change this anytime.

notifications.title: Stay in the loop
notifications.body: Enable notifications for streak protection — we will ping you before the day slips away.

deleteAccount.description: You can permanently delete your account. We will remove associated data from our servers unless we are legally required to retain it.
deleteAccount.confirmMessage: This cannot be undone. Your sessions, streaks, and friendships will be removed.
deleteAccount.errorFallback: Please try again later or contact support.

privacy.intro: This notice explains how Prodify processes personal data. It is not legal advice.

blocks.heading: 1. Controller
blocks.body: The operator of the Prodify services is responsible for processing (see App Store listing or support email). Which environment you use also depends on the API URL configured in the app.

blocks.heading: 2. Data we process
blocks.body: We process account data (email, username), technical data required to run the app, and content you create such as studio sessions (times, types, optional notes/mood/tags), streak and friendship data, and push tokens if you enable notifications.

blocks.heading: 3. Purposes and legal bases
blocks.body: Processing is necessary to perform the contract (GDPR Art. 6(1)(b)), to protect security and prevent abuse (legitimate interests, Art. 6(1)(f)), and — where you consented — for push messages (Art. 6(1)(a)).

blocks.heading: 4. Retention
blocks.body: We store data while your account exists. After deletion, we remove associated personal data unless a legal retention obligation applies.

blocks.heading: 5. Your rights
blocks.body: You have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability, and objection where processing relies on legitimate interests. You may withdraw consent at any time with future effect. You may lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.

blocks.heading: 6. Contact
blocks.body: To exercise your rights or ask questions, use the support address shown in the App Store or in the app.

terms.intro: By using Prodify you agree to these terms. Please read them carefully.

blocks.heading: 1. Service
blocks.body: Prodify helps you track and analyse studio sessions, streaks, and social features among friends. Features and availability may evolve.

blocks.heading: 2. Account
blocks.body: You are responsible for keeping your password secure. Content you submit must not infringe third-party rights or violate applicable law.

blocks.heading: 3. Availability
blocks.body: We strive for high availability but cannot guarantee uninterrupted access — for example during maintenance or force majeure.

blocks.heading: 4. Liability
blocks.body: To the extent permitted by law, we are liable for intent and gross negligence. For slight negligence we are liable only for breaches of essential contractual duties and limited to typical, foreseeable damage.

blocks.heading: 5. Changes
blocks.body: We may update these terms. We will notify you of material changes in the app or otherwise as appropriate. Continued use after notice may constitute acceptance where permitted by law.
